description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, a Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF is already loaded in the Product Explorer. Generate a scatter plot comparing the Red band (band_3) on the X-axis and the NIR band (band_2) on the Y-axis to establish a Soil Line. Export the plot visualization to ~/snap_exports/soil_line_plot.png and the underlying plot data to ~/snap_exports/soil_line_data.txt.
